민수기 28:2.content: “Command the children of Israel, and tell them, ‘See that you present my offering, my food for my offerings made by fire, as a pleasant aroma to me, in their due season.’

민수기 28:3.content: You shall tell them, ‘This is the offering made by fire which you shall offer to Yahweh: male lambs a year old without defect, two day by day, for a continual burnt offering.

민수기 28:4.content: You shall offer the one lamb in the morning, and you shall offer the other lamb at evening,

민수기 28:5.content: with one tenth of an ephah of fine flour for a meal offering, mixed with the fourth part of a hin of beaten oil.

민수기 28:6.content: It is a continual burnt offering which was ordained in Mount Sinai for a pleasant aroma, an offering made by fire to Yahweh.

민수기 28:7.content: Its drink offering shall be the fourth part of a hin for each lamb. You shall pour out a drink offering of strong drink to Yahweh in the holy place.

민수기 28:8.content: The other lamb you shall offer at evening. As the meal offering of the morning, and as its drink offering, you shall offer it, an offering made by fire, for a pleasant aroma to Yahweh.

민수기 28:9.content: “ ‘On the Sabbath day, you shall offer two male lambs a year old without defect, and two tenths of an ephah of fine flour for a meal offering mixed with oil, and its drink offering:

민수기 28:10.content: this is the burnt offering of every Sabbath, in addition to the continual burnt offering and its drink offering.

민수기 28:11.content: “ ‘In the beginnings of your months, you shall offer a burnt offering to Yahweh: two young bulls, one ram, seven male lambs a year old without defect,

민수기 28:12.content: and three tenths of an ephah of fine flour for a meal offering mixed with oil, for each bull; and two tenth parts of fine flour for a meal offering mixed with oil, for the one ram;

민수기 28:13.content: and one tenth part of fine flour mixed with oil for a meal offering to every lamb, as a burnt offering of a pleasant aroma, an offering made by fire to Yahweh.

민수기 28:14.content: Their drink offerings shall be half a hin of wine for a bull, the third part of a hin for the ram, and the fourth part of a hin for a lamb. This is the burnt offering of every month throughout the months of the year.

민수기 28:15.content: Also, one male goat for a sin offering to Yahweh shall be offered in addition to the continual burnt offering and its drink offering.

민수기 28:16.content: “ ‘In the first month, on the fourteenth day of the month, is Yahweh’s Passover.

민수기 28:17.content: On the fifteenth day of this month shall be a feast. Unleavened bread shall be eaten for seven days.

민수기 28:18.content: In the first day shall be a holy convocation. You shall do no regular work,

민수기 28:19.content: but you shall offer an offering made by fire, a burnt offering to Yahweh: two young bulls, one ram, and seven male lambs a year old. They shall be without defect,

민수기 28:20.content: with their meal offering, fine flour mixed with oil. You shall offer three tenths for a bull, and two tenths for the ram.

민수기 28:21.content: You shall offer one tenth for every lamb of the seven lambs;

민수기 28:22.content: and one male goat for a sin offering, to make atonement for you.

민수기 28:23.content: You shall offer these in addition to the burnt offering of the morning, which is for a continual burnt offering.

민수기 28:24.content: In this way you shall offer daily, for seven days, the food of the offering made by fire, of a pleasant aroma to Yahweh. It shall be offered in addition to the continual burnt offering and its drink offering.

민수기 28:25.content: On the seventh day you shall have a holy convocation. You shall do no regular work.

민수기 28:26.content: “ ‘Also in the day of the first fruits, when you offer a new meal offering to Yahweh in your feast of weeks, you shall have a holy convocation. You shall do no regular work;

민수기 28:27.content: but you shall offer a burnt offering for a pleasant aroma to Yahweh: two young bulls, one ram, seven male lambs a year old;

민수기 28:28.content: and their meal offering, fine flour mixed with oil, three tenths for each bull, two tenths for the one ram,

민수기 28:29.content: one tenth for every lamb of the seven lambs;

민수기 28:30.content: and one male goat, to make atonement for you.

민수기 28:31.content: Besides the continual burnt offering and its meal offering, you shall offer them and their drink offerings. See that they are without defect.
